---
name: New task pack
about: Propose or contribute a source-specific task pack
title: "Task pack: "
labels: task-pack, good first issue
---

## Domain

What workflow does this task pack cover?

Examples: GitHub metadata, cloud pricing, app store ratings, finance quotes, local business data.

## Candidate Sources

List the required source URLs or APIs.

## Ground Truth Strategy

- [ ] stable public API
- [ ] source-specific parser
- [ ] regex page extractor
- [ ] manual oracle snapshot
- [ ] not sure yet

## Example Tasks

```yaml
- id:
  question:
  required_source:
  answer_type:
  tolerance:
  ground_truth:
    method:
```

## Notes

What can go wrong? Wrong field, stale value, region, variant, units, or citation support?
